ogTitle: Ballyroe vs Balmain East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ballyroe and Balmain East.
heading: Ballyroe vs Balmain East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ballyroe, New South Wales and Balmain East, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ballyroe has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Balmain East (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ballyroe or Balmain East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ballyroe has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Balmain East scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ballyroe scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Balmain East scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ballyroe or Balmain East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ballyroe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
